reasoning: AICO (Indigenous Authorities of Colombia) is a minor political party that represents indigenous communities. In the Colombian Senate, only two seats are specifically reserved for indigenous constituencies, and AICO typically competes for and wins at most one or two of these reserved seats out of the 108 total Senate seats. Major national parties or coalitions like the Historic Pact, Conservative Party, Liberal Party, Democratic Center, and Radical Change consistently win between 10 and 20+ seats. Given the structural realities of Colombian politics and AICO's limited electoral base, it is virtually impossible for AICO to win the most seats in the 2026 Colombian Senate election. I am going with the lowest allowed probability.
